holdings.infoBox: TAN is an equity ETF with a total of 42 individual holdings. The top holdings are First Solar stock at 12.02%, Nextpower at 8.98%, Enphase Energy at 8.21%, Enlight Renewable Energy at 7.89%, and SolarEdge Technologies at 5.91%.

overview.description: The Invesco Solar ETF (TAN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MAC Global Solar Energy index. The fund tracks an index of global solar energy companies selected based on the revenue generated from solar related business. TAN was launched on Apr 15, 2008 and is issued by Invesco.
